mapper.sql: select id, scene_model_id, cus_device_id, sort, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, variable_type, all_enable, name from scene_model_device
mapper.select: select count(st.id) from scene_model_device s join scene_model_data smd on s.id = smd.scene_model_device_id join scene_tag_points st on smd.id = st.scene_model_data_id where s.id = #{id} and s.del_flag = '0' and smd.del_flag = '0' and st.del_flag = '0'

select sd.id, sd.name, sd.cus_device_id, sd.scene_model_id from iot_device d join scene_model_device sd on d.device_id = sd.cus_device_id where d.del_flag = '0' and sd.del_flag = '0' and d.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT smd.scene_model_id, smd.id scene_model_device_id, smd.variable_type, d.serial_number, sm.scene_model_name, d.device_name FROM scene_model_device smd LEFT JOIN iot_device d on smd.cus_device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN scene_model sm on smd.scene_model_id = sm.scene_model_id WHERE smd.id = #{id}

SELECT smd.scene_model_id, smd.id scene_model_device_id, smd.variable_type, d.serial_number, sm.scene_model_name, d.device_name FROM scene_model_device smd LEFT JOIN iot_device d on smd.cus_device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN scene_model sm on smd.scene_model_id = sm.scene_model_id WHERE smd.id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: update scene_model_device set del_flag = '0' where scene_model_id = #{sceneModelId}
